Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of the Disputed Claims of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Bruce Nelson, Esq. appeared with Petitioner Rao Kaza, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Saylee Wasnik and Saloni Wasnik, who were not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Sudhakar Wasnik, the minors' father, was present, placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Saylee Waskik:

Settlement Amount - $1,666.67.
Attorney's Fees $ - $645.36.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

A net balance of $1,021.31 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Hopyard Hacienda Branch, located at 4767 Hopyard Road, Pleasanton, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of the Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

As to Saloni Wasnik:

Settlement Amount - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Medical Expenses - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00.

Balance - $0.00.

Order Approving the Compromise of the Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
